description: Generate multiple angles and framings for a topic — divergent thinking before strategy, not after
usage: ideate, brainstorm, angles, ideas, framings, creative angles, what if

target.description: The topic, problem, or domain to ideate on

lens.description: Framing approach: mixed (all frameworks), inversion (flip assumptions), analogy (cross-domain), audience (different perspectives), constraint (what if we couldn't...)
